---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement

A clear and concise description of the problem you're trying to solve.
Example: "I'm always frustrated when..."

## Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've
considered.

## Use Case

Describe the use case that would benefit from this feature:

```python
# Example of how this feature would be used
from anbr.regularizers import Covridge

# Desired usage
reg = Covridge(lam1=0.01, lam2=0.001, adaptive=True)  # New feature
```

## Impact

- Does this affect performance? [Yes/No/Unknown]
- Does this change the API? [Yes/No]
- Is this a breaking change? [Yes/No]

## Additional Context

Add any other context, references to papers, or screenshots about the feature
request here.

## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues and discussions
- [ ] This feature aligns with the project's goals
- [ ] I have provided a clear use case
- [ ] I am willing to help implement this feature (optional)
